org.apache.dubbo.rpc

类 RpcStatus

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcStatus

  • public class RpcStatus
extends Object
    URL statistics. (API, Cached, ThreadSafe)
    另请参阅:
    ActiveLimitFilter, ExecuteLimitFilter, LeastActiveLoadBalance
